instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall verify that the actual gear matches the commanded gear.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect mismatch when Actual_Gear_Position differs from Commanded_Gear.

expected_output: IF Actual_Gear_Position != Commanded_Gear THEN Gear_Position_Fault = TRUE
